name: @vitan/shared
description: Shared domain layer for Vitan PMC: design tokens, i18n dictionaries, formatting + civil-date helpers, domain types, derived-readiness truth tables, authorization policy, seed data. A BUILT runtime package (Phase 2 Task 2): apps/web consumes the source via a Vite path alias in dev; apps/api imports the built dual CJS/ESM artifact as a workspace dependency.
